page.title: AI Financial Assistant
page.subtitle: Ask questions about your spending and get personalized insights
page.placeholder: Ask about your budget, categories, or recent expenses...
page.empty: Start a conversation — your assistant analyzes your real transaction data.
page.disclaimer: AI insights are for informational purposes only and do not constitute financial advice.

hero.title: Take back control of your money
hero.subtitle: Lyamo helps you track every purchase, scan receipts with AI, and get honest insights — so you stop bleeding cash left and right.

features.title: Everything you need to stay in control
features.subtitle: From receipt scanning to predictive AI chat — built for people who want clarity, not spreadsheets.

scanner.title: AI Receipt Scanner
scanner.description: Snap a photo, review the draft, and save — no manual typing.

chat.title: Predictive AI Chat
chat.description: Ask your assistant about spending patterns based on your real data.

currency.title: Multi-currency support
currency.description: Track PLN, EUR, GBP, and USD — all converted to your primary currency.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you need more AI power.

overview.p1: Lyamo is a subscription SaaS that helps you track expenses, scan receipts with AI (OCR), categorize transactions, and use an AI financial assistant for informational insights.
overview.p2: By creating an account and using the Service you agree to the Terms.

subscription.title: Subscriptions
subscription.p1: Subscriptions are billed via Stripe and renew for the selected billing cycle. You can cancel at any time; cancellation prevents the next renewal and takes effect at the end of the current billing cycle.

withdrawal.title: Right of withdrawal
withdrawal.p1: As a consumer you generally have 14 days to withdraw from a distance contract. For PRO/Premium, when you request immediate access, you acknowledge that the service performance may begin immediately and you waive the statutory right of withdrawal once the service starts.

refund.title: Voluntary refund (money-back)
refund.p1: We may offer refunds for up to 7 days after purchase if you have not used the app and have not sent any AI scans/messages.
refund.p2: AI features are informational and may be inaccurate. You remain responsible for verifying extracted data and for any decisions you make.

complaints.title: Complaints
complaints.p1: For complaints, contact us using the details in the Impressum.

dataProcessing.title: Data we process
dataProcessing.p1: We process personal data to provide Lyamo, manage your account, process subscriptions, and deliver the AI features you request.
dataProcessing.p2: This includes account data (e.g. email), transaction data you save, chat messages, and receipt scan results.
dataProcessing.p3: We store receipt images only for the time needed for your selected plan and delete them according to our retention policy. You can delete your account and data at any time from Settings.

security.title: Security
security.p1: We use appropriate security measures and we do not sell your personal data.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.intro: We use the following cookie categories:

list.necessary: Necessary cookies — required for the app to function securely.
list.analytics: Analytics cookies — help us understand how the product is used (for example via PostHog).

cookies.outro: Analytics cookies are enabled only after you give consent. You can manage your preferences using the Cookie settings link. We store your cookie decision for up to 365 days.

banner.title: We use cookies
banner.description: We use necessary cookies to keep the app working, and optional cookies for analytics. You can accept all, reject optional ones, or choose categories.

preferences.title: Cookie preferences
preferences.description: Choose which cookie categories we may use. Necessary cookies are always on so the app can function securely.

necessary.title: Necessary
necessary.description: Required for sign-in, session security, language, and core app features. These cannot be disabled.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.description: Help us understand how the product is used (for example PostHog) so we can improve performance and features.

marketing.title: Marketing
marketing.description: Used for optional marketing tools and non-essential third-party widgets. Not required to use the app.
